segments.text: Since I don't have many punish options after shielding their aerials...
segments.original_text: 相手の空中攻撃をシールドした後に有効な反撃手段が乏しいので

segments.text: Against an opponent fishing for the whiff punish...
segments.original_text: じゃあスカし択狙ってくる相手に対しては

segments.text: I thought I'd try to fuzzy jump and get ahead of it, but...
segments.original_text: ファジージャンプで先に飛んでおこうと思ったんですけど

full_text: Since I don't have many punish options after shielding their aerials... Against an opponent fishing for the whiff punish... I thought I'd try to fuzzy jump and get ahead of it, but...
